name: @zm2231/pi-mcporter-bridge
description_en: pi extension that registers each mcporter-managed MCP server's tools natively into pi by attaching to a running `mcporter serve` over Streamable HTTP. Per-server allowlist; tools surface to the agent as first-class pi tools.
description_zh: pi 扩展，通过在运行中的 `mcporter serve` 上附加 Streamable HTTP 来将每个 mcporter 管理的 MCP 服务器的工具原生注册到 pi 中。每服务器允许列表；工具作为一流 pi 工具显示给代理。
